🤖

Our Mission

Curious Bharat Foundation is a non-profit organisation dedicated to making quality STEM and Robotics education accessible to students in rural Maharashtra who would otherwise never encounter these opportunities.

Who We Are

Bridging the Education Gap in Rural India

We travel to schools and colleges across rural Maharashtra, delivering free, engaging STEM and Robotics workshops that spark curiosity and inspire the next generation of innovators.

🏫

School & College Visits

We come directly to your institution — no travel required for students. We set up, deliver, and inspire on-site.

🌾

Rural Maharashtra Focus

Our work is concentrated in rural areas of Maharashtra where access to quality STEM education is limited.

💡

100% Free of Cost

All our programs and workshops are completely free — because every child deserves access to quality education regardless of their background.

What We Do

Our Programs

Hands-on, engaging programs designed to make STEM exciting and accessible for every young learner.

🤖

Robotics Workshops

Interactive, hands-on robotics sessions where students get to build and program robots — many for the very first time. We bring all the equipment.

Hands-On
🔬

STEM Awareness Demos

Live science and technology demonstrations that show students the wonders of STEM in a fun, approachable and memorable way.

Demonstrations
🏫

School & College Outreach

We partner with schools and colleges across rural Maharashtra to conduct sessions — just invite us and we handle the rest, completely free.

Free of Cost
🌱

Curiosity Cultivation

Beyond technical skills, we focus on nurturing a mindset of curiosity, problem-solving, and innovation in young students.

Mindset
🤝

Community Engagement

We work with local communities, educators, and institutions to create lasting impact and sustainable interest in STEM education.

Community
📡

Knowledge Bridging

Connecting rural students to the same quality of STEM exposure that their urban peers enjoy — because talent is everywhere, opportunity is not.

Equity
Reach Out

Let's Bring STEM to Your School

Are you a teacher, principal, or institution in rural Maharashtra? Invite us to your school or college — our programs are completely free of cost. We'd love to hear from you!
